title: Horizontal Pod Autoscaling — Key behaviors for pod readiness
text:
If a Pod is
Ready
and remains
Ready
, it can be counted as contributing metrics even within the delay.
If a Pod rapidly toggles between
Ready
and
Unready
, metrics are ignored until it’s considered stably
Ready
.

Configure a
startupProbe
that doesn't pass until the high CPU usage has passed, or
Ensure your
readinessProbe
only reports
Ready
after
the CPU spike subsides, using
initialDelaySeconds
.
And ideally also set
--horizontal-pod-autoscaler-cpu-initialization-period
to
cover the startup duration
.
